title: Fix mob sprite PNG transparent background

log.context: Fix mob sprite PNG transparent background

Done. Here's a summary of what was done:

**Fix applied:** Removed lines 38-40 from `/mnt/data/scripts/render-mob-sprite.js` — the `ctx.fillStyle = '#000000'` + `ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 64, 64)` block that filled the canvas black before drawing sprites. The canvas now starts transparent (node-canvas default for PNG), and `canvas.toBuffer('image/png')` preserves alpha correctly.
